summary.en: 30-60 minute conversation with target customers about their world, jobs, pains, and gains. The first move when you have a desirability hypothesis but no data — surfaces the problem framing, not the solution.
summary.zh: 用 30-60 分钟和目标客户聊他们的世界、要做的事、痛点和收益。当你只有一个需求性假设、还没有任何数据时,先做这一步 —— 它探的是问题的框,不是解决方案。

sources.label: Bland & Osterwalder · Testing Business Ideas · Wiley · 2019 · Discovery / Customer Interview
Steve Portigal · Interviewing Users · Rosenfeld Media · 2013
Erika Hall · Just Enough Research · A Book Apart · 2013

text.en:
Replace this with one fragile assumption.

e.g. [Customer segment X] in [context Y] suffers [pain Z] severely enough that they'd switch from their current workaround.
text.zh:
替换成一条最致命的假设。

例如:[客户群体 X] 在 [场景 Y] 中承受 [痛点 Z] 严重到愿意从现有替代方案切换过来。

text.en:
We believe [problem assumption].

To verify, we will interview 8 customers from [segment].

And measure the number who mention the pain unprompted.

We're right if ≥ 5/8 mention it within 2 weeks.
text.zh:
我们相信 [问题假设]。

为了验证,我们将 访谈 8 位 [目标客户]。

并测量 不引导下提及该痛点的人数。

如果 ≥ 5/8 在 2 周内提到 = 通过。

text.en:
Recruit: 8 ICP-matched customers via LinkedIn cold outreach + community posts.

Run: 30-60 min open-ended conversations. Start with "tell me about the last time you [scenario]". No leading questions, no pitching the solution.

Record: 5-10 direct quotes per session. Post-process into jobs / pains / gains on the VPC.
text.zh:
招募: 通过 LinkedIn 冷邮 + 客户社区帖招到 8 位符合 ICP 的目标客户。

执行: 30-60 分钟开放式对话,以「最近一次遇到 [场景] 的经历」起手,不引导也不推销方案。

记录: 每场抓 5-10 条直接引语,会后归到 VPC 的 jobs / pains / gains。

text.en:
Pass: ≥ 5/8 customers mention [core pain] unprompted, severity ≥ 7/10.

Fail: < 5/8 mention it, OR they describe a fundamentally different pain.
text.zh:
通过: ≥ 5/8 客户不引导地提到 [核心痛点],严重度 ≥ 7/10。

失败: < 5/8 提到,或客户描述的痛点完全不同。

text.en:
Fill in after running.

Observed: __ /8 mentioned the pain. Severity median: __ .

Verdict: validated / invalidated / inconclusive.
text.zh:
实验后填写。

实际观察:__ /8 提到痛点。严重度中位数:__ 。

结论:已验证 / 已证伪 / 不清晰。

text.en:
Pick one based on the result.

• Persevere → next D experiment (e.g. Smoke Test on [solution sketch]).
• Pivot → reframe the assumption — what pain came up instead?
• Kill → this offering doesn't survive; investigate a new segment.
text.zh:
根据结果选一个。

• Persevere → 同方向下一个 D 实验(如 [方案草稿] 的 Smoke Test)。
• Pivot → 换假设 —— 浮现出来的是什么痛点?
• Kill → 这条提供物活不了,换个客户群体重新探。
